课程特色

🏆 写作比赛题目

结合 WQED KIDS Writers Contest、The Storyworks Kid Fiction Writing Contest 历年比赛要求进行写作练习

📖 获奖作文赏析

分析历年获奖作品，学习优秀写作的特点与方法

🪜 分步骤写作指导

从头脑风暴到初稿完成，老师全程引导，帮助孩子顺利推进

🖍 写作成果展示

完成写作、修改与展示，学习过程完整，成果清晰可见

课程安排
📅 每个 Session 共 4 节课（每周 2 次 × 2 周）
Grade 1 WQED KIDS Writers Contest
Session 16/8–6/12; 6/15–6/19
My Future / When I Grow Up
Session 26/22–6/26; 7/6–7/10
Be Kind / Helping Others
Session 37/13–7/17; 7/20–7/24
Animal Adventure / Super Pet
Session 47/27–7/31; 8/3–8/7
My Dream Playground / Treehouse...
Grade 2 – 3 The Storyworks Kid Fiction Writing Contest
Session 16/8–6/12; 6/15–6/19
"It's never easy being the new kid."
Session 26/22–6/26; 7/6–7/10
"Tuesday was the day everything changed."
Session 37/13–7/17; 7/20–7/24
"This was no ordinary pizza."
Session 47/27–7/31; 8/3–8/7
"Nobody knew how the dog got into the school."
Grade 4 – 5 The Storyworks Kid Fiction Writing Contest
Session 16/8–6/12; 6/15–6/19
"Time traveling might sound like a strange job for a kid..."
Session 26/22–6/26; 7/6–7/10
"Getting a pet monkey was a huge mistake."
Session 37/13–7/17; 7/20–7/24
"Our grandma was not who she said she was."
Session 47/27–7/31; 8/3–8/7
"We all knew the cafeteria was haunted."
学习成果

✏️ 写作能力提升

  • 学习如何构思有趣的故事，塑造更生动的人物
  • 练习设计故事情节、结构和简单转折
  • 学习写好开头和结尾，并尝试加入细节和对话
  • 熟悉常见写作比赛题型，为今后参赛做好准备

📚 课程成果

  • 每个 Session 完成 1 篇原创写作
  • 每个 Session 安排课堂展示与分享
  • 夏令营结束时，完成 4 篇完整作品
  • 帮助孩子建立更清晰的故事结构意识和写作表达能力
